description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style metal trolley with a deep, open rectangular container designed for carrying heavy loads. The exterior is constructed from riveted steel plates, featuring a rugged, textured diamond tread pattern on the sides for added grip and durability. The trolley is supported by four solid metal wheels, each with a simple, functional design suitable for rolling over rough urban surfaces. On one side, there is a prominent horizontal handlebar, also made of metal, allowing for easy pushing or pulling. The interior is spacious and unlined, optimized for transporting bulk materials or equipment. The overall finish is a weathered, matte gray, giving it a utilitarian and slightly worn appearance typical of public or industrial urban environments.
description: A heavy-duty metal trolley with a deep open container, diamond-tread sides, and four solid wheels, finished in weathered gray. It features a sturdy metal handle for pushing or pulling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat, riveted steel panel and diamond-tread side edges, with no visible handle or wheels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the main handlebar, rugged steel panel, and two of the four wheels at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view with a smaller handle and the same riveted steel panel, with the wheels partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main handlebar and two wheels, mirroring view 1 but with a different steel panel pattern.
attribute_handle_type: single bar handle, straight, made of metal with a slightly textured grip, fixed horizontally on one side
attribute_wheel_arrangement: four wheels, two on each side in parallel configuration
